fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Save button with inline name input stores current ThemeColors + EffectSettings to localStorage. 2. Saved themes grid shows cards with 6-color swatch, name, timestamp. 3. Double-click card name to rename. 4. Apply / Delete buttons per card. 5. Export button downloads theme as JSON. 6. Import button accepts JSON file and applies theme.
fields.description: Add saved-themes management to the ThemeSettings overlay. Includes: save current theme with name, load saved themes from localStorage grid, rename saved themes (double-click), delete saved themes, export theme as JSON file, import theme from JSON file. Saved theme cards show 6-color swatch preview and creation timestamp.
fields.title: Feature: Theme save/load/export/import
